tree.name: Trae Young
tree.tradeDescription: WAS traded CJ McCollum and Corey Kispert to ATL for Trae Young
tree.note: 3x All-Star, elite playmaker acquired from Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: CJ McCollum
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/NOP/HOU): WAS sent Poole, Saddiq Bey, Micah Peavy (#40) to NOP. NOP sent McCollum, Olynyk, 2027 2nd (CHI) to WAS. HOU sent Whitmore to WAS for 2026 2nd + 2029 2nd.
assetsGivenUp.note: Veteran guard acquired from New Orleans in 3-team trade

assetsGivenUp.name: Jordan Poole
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: WAS traded Chris Paul to GSW for Baldwin Jr., Poole, Rollins, 2027 2nd (GSW), 2030 1st (GSW)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from GSW in Chris Paul trade, sent to NOP in 2025

assetsGivenUp.name: Chris Paul
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade (WAS/PHX/IND): WAS sent Bradley Beal, Goodwin, Todd to PHX; Walker (#8) + 2029 2nd to IND. PHX sent Chris Paul, Shamet, picks to WAS.

assetsGivenUp.name: Bradley Beal
assetsGivenUp.note: #3 overall pick by WAS in 2012 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Saddiq Bey
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as FA to multi-year deal. Sent to NOP in 2025 3-team trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 2nd Round Pick (#40)
assetsGivenUp.note: WAS own 2nd round pick, sent to NOP

assetsGivenUp.name: Corey Kispert
assetsGivenUp.note: #15 overall pick by WAS in 2021 NBA Draft
